ExtensionManifest.Name: tawk.to Chat Integration
ExtensionManifest.Author: ConnectWise Labs
ExtensionManifest.ShortDescription: Adds the tawk.to Chat widget to the Guest Page (requires a tawk.to account)

Setting.Name: tawkEmbedUrl
Setting.Description: The unique identification for your organization's tawk.to Live Chat widget. It is the URL included in the Widget code (ex https://embed.tawk.to/568gkd8a1c9dbkh8110a47de/default).
